project.name: 23 — Mock Website (views · navigate · setText · transferOnClick · show/hide)

M19.name: hero_heading
M19.text: We craft digital experiences that endure.

M20.name: hero_sub
M20.text: Brand, digital, motion. We work with founders and companies who care about craft.

wires.actionArgs: A complete visual language built from the ground up for Helix, a B2B SaaS company entering a competitive market. We developed a distinctive identity rooted in clarity and momentum — a wordmark, colour palette, type system, and a full component library that scales across digital and print.

End-to-end design and development of Orin, a logistics intelligence platform serving mid-market operators. The project spanned discovery, information architecture, interface design, and front-end delivery — resulting in a 40% reduction in task completion time across core workflows.

A systematic motion language for Arc, a fintech startup. We defined timing curves, transition principles, and a micro-interaction library that gives the product a distinct, considered feel. Delivered as a documented specification and Figma plugin for the engineering team.
Deliverables: Wordmark · Colour System · Type Scale · Brand Guidelines · Component Library
Deliverables: UX Research · Wireframes · UI System · Design Handoff · Front-End Code
Deliverables: Motion Principles · Timing Library · Micro-interactions · Figma Plugin · Docs

M63.name: about_bio
M63.text: We are a small, independent design studio working at the intersection of brand, digital, and motion. Founded in 2012, we have spent over a decade helping companies define who they are and communicate it with precision. We do not take on more work than we can do well.

M70.name: clients_text
M70.text: Helix Technologies · Orin Logistics · Arc Financial · Meridian Health · Veil Studios · Croft & Co · Pulse Media · Nova Robotics

M78.name: contact_sub
M78.text: Have a project in mind? Tell us about it.
